# mlir-opt --arm-neon-2d-to-intr crashes when handling tensor.from_elements

**Author:** mlirBug
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/178209
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** mlir:core, crash, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2026-02-12T16:31:59Z

## Body

mlir-opt version: 22.1.0-rc1

The crash is triggered while processing a tensor.from_elements operation
producing a tensor<1xindex>, which leads to an invalid llvm::cast to
mlir::IntegerAttr and causes a hard assertion failure.

```
mlir-opt --arm-neon-2d-to-intr test.mlir
```
```mlir
module {
  func.func @main() {
    %0 = ub.poison : index
    %1 = tensor.from_elements %0 : tensor<1xindex>
    cf.br ^bb1(%1 : tensor<1xindex>)
    ^bb1(%arg0: tensor<1xindex>):
    return
  }
}
```

```
mlir-opt: llvm-project-llvmorg-22.1.0-rc1/llvm/include/llvm/Support/Casting.h:560: decltype(auto) llvm::cast(const From&) [with To = mlir::IntegerAttr; From = mlir::Attribute]: Assertion `isa<To>(Val) && "cast<Ty>() argument of incompatible type!"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace and instructions to reproduce the bug.
Stack dump:
0.      Program arguments: llvmorg-22.1.0-install/bin/mlir-opt --arm-neon-2d-to-intr test.mlir
 #0 0x000059d1a210fe32 llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) (llvmorg-22.1.0-install/bin/mlir-opt+0x252fe32)
 #1 0x000059d1a210c5af llvm::sys::RunSignalHandlers() (llvmorg-22.1.0-install/bin/mlir-opt+0x252c5af)
 #2 0x000059d1a210c6fc SignalHandler(int, siginfo_t*, void*) Signals.cpp:0:0
 #3 0x00007f1361e45330 (/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6+0x45330)
 #4 0x00007f1361e9eb2c __pthread_kill_implementation ./nptl/pthread_kill.c:44:76
 #5 0x00007f1361e9eb2c __pthread_kill_internal ./nptl/pthread_kill.c:78:10
 #6 0x00007f1361e9eb2c pthread_kill ./nptl/pthread_kill.c:89:10
 #7 0x00007f1361e4527e raise ./signal/../sysdeps/posix/raise.c:27:6
 #8 0x00007f1361e288ff abort ./stdlib/abort.c:81:7
 #9 0x00007f1361e2881b _nl_load_domain ./intl/loadmsgcat.c:1177:9
#10 0x00007f1361e3b517 (/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6+0x3b517)
```

## Comments

### Comment 1 - JueonPark

I made [a fix PR](https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/179113) regarding this issue:

The crash is triggered while processing a tensor.from_elements operation
producing a tensor&lt;1xindex&gt;, which leads to an invalid llvm::cast to
mlir::IntegerAttr and causes a hard assertion failure.


```mlir

  func.func @<!-- -->main() {
    %0 = ub.poison : index
    %1 = tensor.from_elements %0 : tensor&lt;1xindex&gt;

    ^bb1(%arg0: tensor&lt;1xindex&gt;):
    return
  }
}
```
